name: subject_name_present
expression: subject_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(subject_name)) > 0
description: SAR subject name is required for case investigation and filing.

name: transaction_count_positive
description: Transaction count should be positive when present.

name: activity_date_order
expression: activity_start_date IS NULL OR activity_end_date IS NULL OR activity_start_date <= activity_end_date
description: SAR activity start date cannot be after activity end date.

name: activity_type_present
description: Suspicious activity category should be captured for AML analytics.
